Reviews Contact

About Super Roofing Company

12+ years serving Charlotte and surrounding areas

Super Roofing Company started with a simple goal: to provide Charlotte homeowners with reliable, high-quality roofing solutions. We're not just roofers; we're your neighbors, committed to protecting your homes from the unpredictable North Carolina weather.

We built our reputation on honesty, integrity, and superior workmanship. We approach every project, from minor repairs to full roof replacements, with meticulous attention to detail and a commitment to exceeding your expectations. We understand the challenges of Charlotte's climate and build roofs to last.

We're deeply invested in the Charlotte community. We source materials locally whenever possible and actively support local charities. We're proud to contribute to the growth and resilience of our city.

12+ Years in Business
800+ Projects Completed
97% Client Satisfaction
20+ Team Members
Super Roofing Company

Trusted roofer professionals serving Charlotte, NC and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
